things.name: Salar de Uyuni
things.description: World's largest salt flat at 3,656m - mirror effect in the wet season is extraordinary

things.name: Teleferico Cable Car System
things.description: World's highest cable car network - 10 lines across La Paz at 3,650m altitude

things.name: Witches' Market (Mercado de las Brujas)
things.description: Aymara market selling llama foetuses, coca leaves and potions for Pachamama rituals

things.name: Death Road Mountain Biking
things.description: 60km downhill from 4,700m to 1,200m on the world's most dangerous road

things.name: Tiwanaku Archaeological Site
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 1,500-year-old pre-Inca civilization site 70km from La Paz

things.name: Plaza Murillo & Cathedral
things.description: Government square with Bolivia's parliament, cathedral and the presidential palace

things.name: Cholita Wrestling
things.description: Bolivian female indigenous wrestlers fighting in traditional pollera skirts and bowler hats

things.name: Valle de la Luna (Moon Valley)
things.description: Eerie eroded clay pinnacle landscape 10km from the centre

things.name: Lake Titicaca Day Trip
things.description: World's highest navigable lake - Taquile Island and the reed islands of the Uros

things.name: Salteña at Mercado Rodriguez
things.description: Bolivia's favourite breakfast - a baked pastry stuffed with spiced meat and boiled egg
